calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Kimberly Watts was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Kimberly Lashay Rucker.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Reset To Sep-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Kimberly Lashay Watts was present in pro per, but did not have a Proof of Publication of the Proposed Name Change in the case file.

Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Name is continued to September 18, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Reset To Sep-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Kimberly Lashay Watts was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication filed today, July 29, 2008.

Due to a typographical error on the part of the newspaper which published petitioner's proposed name change, the Court cannot go forward with these proceedings at this time.

Good cause appearing, the matter is continued to September 4, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Reset To Jul-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
